chunks.text: Ph.D. Student Guide - EECS at Berkeley Ph.D. Student Guide This guide describes the process for obtaining the degree of Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) in EECS. The Ph.D. milestone chart below provides an overview of the necessary steps you will need to take before getting your Ph.D. Please contact the Staff Graduate Advisors (Electrical Engineering (EE): grads-ee@berkeley.edu, 217 Cory Hall / Computer Science (CS): grads-cs@berkeley.edu, 367 Soda Hall) to obtain any forms and additional information, or if you have any questions. The complete set of EECS policies and procedures can be found in the Graduate Handbook . < Ph.D. Petitions Ph.D. Coursework > Ph.D. Student Guide Ph.D. Coursework Ph.D. EE and CS Prelim Exam Preparation Ph.D. Qualifying Examination Ph.D. Teaching Requirement Ph.D. Student Review Ph.D. Petitions Ph.D. Graduation and Filing Ph.D. Post-Graduation Guide Grad school can be a challenging time We are here to help View Open Faculty Positions
